channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INDUSINDBK] IndusInd Bank: Revised Disclosure on Share Encumbrance
item.description:
IndusInd Bank Ltd. received a revised disclosure on April 30, 2026, under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The revision pertains to a clerical omission in the initial disclosure regarding share encumbrance. The company clarified that there were no changes to the terms, nature, or extent of the encumbrance. Revised disclosures were submitted for both INDUSIND INTERNATIONAL HOLDINGS LTD and INDUSIND LTD, related to the creation of pledge for refinancing existing indebtedness. IndusInd International Holdings encumbered 2.86% of total share capital and IndusInd Ltd encumbered 3.59% of total share capital in favor of Catalyst Trusteeship Limited as a Security Agent for Lenders.

  • Revised disclosure filed under SEBI SAST Regulations 31(1) and 31(2).
  • Correction of clerical omission; no change in encumbrance terms.
  • IndusInd International Holdings created pledge of 2.86% shares.
  • IndusInd Ltd created pledge of 3.59% shares.
  • Encumbrance is for refinancing existing indebtedness.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDUSIND BANK LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [INDUSINDBK] IndusInd Bank: Promoter Share Encumbrance Release
item.description:
IndusInd Bank Ltd. received a revised disclosure on April 30, 2026, regarding the release of encumbrance on shares by IndusInd International Holdings Ltd and IndusInd Ltd, under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The release of pledge occurred on March 27, 2026, with IndusInd International Holdings Ltd releasing 3,17,85,006 shares (4.08%), and IndusInd Ltd releasing 2,79,78,546 shares (3.59%). The shares were previously encumbered in favor of Barclays Bank PLC and Deutsche Bank AG, London Branch.

  • Revised disclosure received for release of share encumbrance.
  • IndusInd International Holdings Ltd released 3,17,85,006 shares (4.08%).
  • IndusInd Ltd released 2,79,78,546 shares (3.59%).
  • Encumbrance release occurred on March 27, 2026.
  • Shares were encumbered in favor of Barclays Bank PLC and Deutsche Bank AG.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDUSIND BANK LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [TVSMOTOR] TVS Motor April 2026 Sales Up 7% YoY at 473,970 Units
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TVS Motor Company reported a 7% sales growth in April 2026, with total sales of 473,970 units compared to 443,716 units in April 2025. While customer retail demand remained robust, dispatch volumes were affected by supply chain constraints, including workforce availability and raw material shortages. Two-wheeler sales increased by 6%, with domestic two-wheeler sales up 8%. Electric vehicle sales grew by 36%. International business sales saw a 3% increase. The company has implemented countermeasures and expects production to recover in May 2026.

  • TVS Motor's total sales grew 7% YoY to 473,970 units in April 2026.
  • Two-wheeler sales increased by 6% to 455,333 units.
  • Domestic two-wheeler sales grew by 8% to 348,545 units.
  • Electric vehicle sales surged by 36% to 37,771 units.
  • International business sales increased by 3% to 120,008 units.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TVS MOTOR COMPANY LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [SHRIRAMFIN] Shriram Finance: Promoter Encumbers 0.01% Shares Due to SHA
item.description:
Shriram Finance Ltd. announced that Shriram Ownership Trust, a promoter entity, has encumbered 310,400 shares (0.01% of total share capital) due to transfer restrictions under a shareholders agreement (SHA) with MUFG Bank Ltd. and other entities. The SHA, executed on April 8, 2026, imposes restrictions on share transfers for three years, with further limitations on transfers to 'Restricted Persons' after this period. These restrictions cease if MUFG Bank Ltd.'s shareholding falls below 10%. The disclosure is a revised filing of Annexure II, following a request from BSE Limited.

  • Shriram Ownership Trust encumbered 310,400 shares (0.01% of share capital).
  • Encumbrance due to transfer restrictions under SHA with MUFG Bank Ltd. and others.
  • Transfer restrictions in place for three years from April 8, 2026.
  • Restrictions cease if MUFG Bank Ltd.'s holding falls below 10%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Finance Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [MARIS] Maris Spinners Board Meeting on May 28, 2026
item.description:
Maris Spinners Ltd has announced a Board Meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026, to approve the audited financial results for the year ending March 31, 2026. The board will also fix the date for the Annual General Meeting, approve the meeting's notice, and approve the book closure/record date. Additionally, related party transactions for the half-year ending March 31, 2026, will be reviewed, and the reappointment of Mr. T Raghuraman as Managing Director for a 3-year term will be considered.

  • Board to approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • AGM date and notice to be approved.
  • Reappointment of Mr. T Raghuraman as Managing Director for 3 years.
  • Related party transactions for H2 FY26 to be reviewed.
  • Book closure/Record date to be approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MARIS SPINNERS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ALICON] Alicon Castalloy Board Meeting Scheduled for May 12, 2026
item.description:
Alicon Castalloy Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The board will also consider declaring an interim dividend, if any, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting to approve audited standalone financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Board meeting to approve audited consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Consideration of interim dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Alicon Castalloy Limited | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NTPC] NTPC: 100 MW Solar PV Project at Ramagundam Commences Operation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NTPC Ltd announces the commercial operation of 100 MW capacity out of its 176 MW Solar PV Project at Ramagundam, Telangana, effective May 2, 2026. This addition increases the total installed capacity of the NTPC group to 89,805 MW and the commercial capacity to 88,725 MW.

  • NTPC commissions 100 MW of its Ramagundam Solar PV Project.
  • The project's commercial operation began on May 2, 2026.
  • NTPC group's total installed capacity reaches 89,805 MW.
  • Commercial capacity of NTPC group now stands at 88,725 MW.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NTPC LTD. | Category: Project Update

item.title: [FINKURVE] Finkurve Financial: Revised Disclosure on Pledge Release
item.description:
Finkurve Financial Services Ltd. has received a revised disclosure under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 on April 30, 2026, for Ketan B Kothari. The revision pertains to the release of pledge on 90,75,000 equity shares. An earlier submission on April 08, 2026, contained an error in the number of shares already encumbered, which was inadvertently mentioned as 90,75,000 instead of 1,50,00,000, leading to an incorrect percentage. The revised disclosure rectifies this error.

  • Revised disclosure received for release of pledge on Finkurve Financial shares.
  • Error corrected regarding the number of shares encumbered in previous disclosure.
  • Original encumbered shares were 1,50,00,000, not 90,75,000 as previously stated.
  • Percentage of encumbered shares corrected from 6.48% to 10.71%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Finkurve Financial Services Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [RASRESOR] Ras Resorts: Delisting Offer for 23.22% Equity Shares
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sobhagya Capital Options Pvt. Ltd., the Manager to the Offer, announced a delisting offer for Ras Resorts and Apart Hotels Ltd. The promoter acquirers intend to acquire up to 9,21,582 equity shares, representing 23.22% of the paid-up equity share capital, to delist the company from BSE. The delisting is aimed at providing an exit opportunity for public shareholders and enabling the promoters to manage the business with greater operational flexibility.

  • Ras Resorts proposes delisting of 39,69,743 equity shares from BSE.
  • Promoters aim to acquire 9,21,582 equity shares (23.22%) for delisting.
  • Delisting is intended to provide exit opportunity to public shareholders.
  • Company cites disproportionately high listing costs as rationale for delisting.
  • Sobhagya Capital Options Pvt. Ltd. is the Manager to the Offer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAS RESORTS & APART HOTELS LTD. | Category: Delisting

item.title: [IBULHSGFIN] Sammaan Capital: 41,110 Shares Tendered in Open Offer
item.description:
Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited, the manager to the open offer for Sammaan Capital Ltd, informed BSE that 41,110 equity shares, constituting 0.01% of the offer size, were tendered in the open offer escrow demat account as of April 30, 2026. Nil equity shares were tendered on April 30, 2026. The shares are subject to validation and verification of documents, and the number of shares accepted may differ from those tendered.

  • 41,110 equity shares tendered in Sammaan Capital's open offer.
  • Tendered shares represent 0.01% of the total offer size.
  • Shares are subject to validation and verification process.
  • Final accepted shares may differ from the tendered amount.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indiabulls Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Open Offer
